between her 37th and 39th year.
The native's father will be a teacher. His brothers will seize hold of his
wealth and property and drive him out ofthe place. He will lose his eye sight
then. He will face great hardships. Her mother is a religious lady. She is a
woman who rose from poverty. Due to her good fortune her husband (the
native's father) will get his vision back.
CHART 273
Venus, Mercury and Ketu are together in one house. The native will be
a scholar and a person of repute. He will wander from one end of the country
to the other for some time and then fmally settle down at some place and
practise his trade. There is Ketu between Saturn and Venus, Jupiter and Saturn
are on one side. So intellect and good fortune are on one side. Saturn and Mars
are in one house. Therefore the native's business will need great capital
investment and he will deal in machinery. Saturn and Mars first meet Jupiter
and Rahu in the watery sign Cancer. By this Guru Chandala Yoga is formed.
